word: G2084 - ἑτερόγλωσσος - heteróglōssos - het-er-og'-loce-sos - Man of other tongue

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑτερόγλωσσος

- Transliteration: heteroglossos

- Phonetic: het-er-og'-loce-sos

- Definition:

1. one who speaks a foreign language

- Origin: from G2087 and G1100

- TDNT entry: 13:06,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G2087 and G1100; other tongued that is a foreigner: - man of other tongue.
